description: Credible, real-time disaster shelter information for AI agents and people

novel_features.name: Closest open shelter, including pet-friendly
novel_features.description: Ranks open shelters by straight-line distance from a lat,lon, ZIP, or street address; geocodes shelters that are missing coordinates and reports any it cannot locate rather than dropping them.

novel_features.name: Honest capacity, never a fabricated denominator
novel_features.description: Computes utilization only where both a population and a capacity are reported, labeling the denominator (evacuation vs post-impact), and surfaces shelters reported FULL without asserting it as ground truth.

novel_features.name: One-call situational briefing
novel_features.description: One command returns the open count, a breakdown by state, pet-friendly and accessible counts, and the capacity picture, with an optional human briefing.

novel_features.name: Filtered open-shelter listing
novel_features.description: Open shelters flattened from the feed and filterable by state, pets, ADA, wheelchair, managing org, and status.

novel_features.name: Flattened shelter detail by stable id
novel_features.description: Full detail for one shelter joined on the stable shelter_id rather than the churning objectid, with unreported fields as explicit null.
